task_completion.description: Agent navigates the view to the Dardanelles strait.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view shows the Dardanelles strait (the waterway connecting the Aegean Sea to the Sea of Marmara).

task_completion.description: Agent uses the Ruler tool to measure the strait width.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Ruler' dialog box is open, or a yellow measurement line is visible spanning the water.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies the correct narrowest location (Nara Burnu).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final placemark or measurement focus is located at the sharp bend near coordinates 40.183°N, 26.417°E.
The 'New Placemark' or 'Google Earth - New Placemark' properties dialog is visible.
The 'Name' field in the dialog or the label on the map reads exactly 'Bridge_Site_Recommendation'.

task_completion.description: Description field includes the measured width (approx 1250m).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field contains text indicating a width between 1150m and 1350m (e.g., 'Width: 1250m').

task_completion.description: The placemark is saved to My Places.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item 'Bridge_Site_Recommendation' appears in the 'Places' sidebar under 'My Places'.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the mapping software GUI directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Google Earth (or similar) interface, toolbars, and dialogs being used, not a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: Agent performed measurements rather than just placing a point.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ruler tool dialog or measurement lines were visible on the map during the session, indicating active measurement.

integrity.description: Placemark was created manually, not imported.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the 'Add Placemark' tool/dialog rather than 'File > Open' to load a pre-made KML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The narrowest point of the Dardanelles is at Nara Burnu (approx 40.183°N, 26.417°E). The width at this location is approximately 1,250 meters.
